title: OPTIONAL not working correctly in CONSTRUCT, works OK in SELECT
key_bug_features: CONSTRUCT with multiple OPTIONAL clauses returning empty results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE medicinal_products (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255), prefLabel VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO medicinal_products (id, title, prefLabel) VALUES (1, 'AMOKSIKLAV 1,2 G', NULL);
SELECT title, prefLabel FROM medicinal_products WHERE id = 1;
SELECT title, NULLIF(prefLabel, '') AS prefLabel FROM medicinal_products WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COALESCE(title, 'No Title') AS title, COALESCE(prefLabel, 'No Label') AS prefLabel FROM medicinal_products WHERE id = 1;
